title: Mansfield +3
description: 7x5 min @ 100-105% with 4 min rest — threshold progression
purpose: Extended threshold work at and above FTP

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/7. 70% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting strong. 7 reps to go. The first one sets your standard for the rest.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 5:00 at 100-105% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 1/7. You're starting fresh. Set the standard for the rest of the workout.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/7. 105% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 2 of 7.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 2/7. 105% FTP. Relax upper body, drive through hips. Don't let cadence collapse.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 2/7. You're not breaking — you're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Starting. 105% for 5:00. Controlled aggression. Lock in form early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is harder than the last one. That's the point. Rep 3/7.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 35% through session. Rep 3/7. You've done 10min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 3/7. You're building something real here. 4 more opportunities to get stronger.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/7. Fun fact: this is the exact power output where regret lives.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/7. 105% FTP × 5:00. Seated. 4 more to build fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 4:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 41% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 4:00. Then 42min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 41% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 46% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 5:00 at 105%. Then 4:00 rest. Pace yourself for repeatability.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 46% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 46% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 46% done. 105% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 42 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 4:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 50-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 58% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 58% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 58% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 58% done. 105% for 5:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 64% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 51 minutes of work done. 24 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 51 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 24 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where you earn it. 1 more reps. Your legs are screaming. Good.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 69% complete. 105% for 5:00. Fatigue is real — maintain 95-105 rpm, don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 55 minutes of work done. 19 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 69% into session. 105% at 95-105 rpm. Stay sharp on technique.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% done. 0 intervals left. 15 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 30min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 75% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 4:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. 5:00 at 105%. Empty the tank. You've got 10 minutes of cooldown coming.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 5:00 at 105%. Then 10min cooldown. Empty the tank correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last one. Everything you have. Then you're done and you'll be stronger for it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Same power as last time, but you're way more tired. Progressive overload! *cries in watts*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last rep. 100-105% FTP, 95-105 rpm, Seated. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 87% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 87% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
